theme.primary_archetype: Archetype 4: Swiss & High-Contrast (Adapted for Apple-like clean design)
theme.description: A modern tech marketplace UI that blends CompAsia's trustworthiness, Carousell's community feel, and Apple's clean aesthetic. Prioritizes soft depth, airy spacing, and glassmorphism elements over a stark background. High contrast for readability.

rules.cta: Use Navy Blue (#0B1F3A) for primary actions like 'Buy Now' or 'Submit'. Use Teal (#14B8A6) for AI-powered features, verified badges, and secondary highlights.
rules.hover_states: Always use a lighter or darker shade of the active color. e.g. hover:bg-[#142B4A] for Navy Blue.
rules.gradients: Avoid full-screen gradients. Use subtle radial gradients in backgrounds for the AI Valuation page only.

typography.strategy: The 'Soft Utility' - Rounded, friendly, yet tech-forward.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight font-bold text-slate-900 dark:text-white
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight font-semibold text-slate-900 dark:text-white
hierarchy.overline: text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-teal-600 dark:text-teal-400

typography.rules: Never use Inter. Use tracking-tight on all headings above 32px. Use leading-relaxed for body text for optimal readability.

rules: Use p-6 or p-8 for standard cards. No cramped content.
Mobile-first: default to grid-cols-1, use gap-6 or gap-8.
Use Bento-style grids for the Home page (Categories, Featured, AI showcase). Combine square and tall spans to create visual tension.
Mobile navigation: Bottom Tab Bar (Home, Buy, Sell, Chat, Profile).
Desktop navigation: Sticky Sidebar or Top Nav with Crystal Glassmorphism.

surfaces.cards: Apple-style flat surface with soft ambient shadow. Light mode: bg-white shadow-[0_4px_24px_rgba(0,0,0,0.04)] rounded-2xl or rounded-3xl. Dark mode: bg-slate-900 border border-slate-800 rounded-2xl.
surfaces.glassmorphism: Use for sticky headers and bottom navs. backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 (Light) or bg-slate-950/70 (Dark). Must include a subtle 1px border on the edge.
surfaces.ai_elements: Use 'The Tracing Beam' or subtle glowing borders (border-teal-500/30 with drop-shadow) to indicate AI valuation or smart matching.

rules: Smooth page transitions using Framer Motion (fade and slide up).
Hover effects on product cards: slight lift (-translate-y-1) and shadow increase.
Animated statistics/numbers counting up for Trust Stats and AI Valuation.
AI Valuation scanning animation: a line sweeping across the gadget image.

icons.usage: Use stroke-width 1.5 for a clean, premium Apple-like feel.

hero_and_featured.description: MacBook Pro beside iPad and iPhone turned on - Use for Main Hero Section
White smartphone near laptop - Use for 'Sell Smart' block

people_and_testimonials.description: Happy couple using phone - Use for buyer/seller testimonials
Diverse group of women - Use for Community/Trust section

abstract_and_ai.description: Blue and black digital wallpaper - Use as background for AI Valuation showcase

components_instructions.Navigation: Implement a bottom tab bar for mobile (fixed bottom, z-50, glassmorphism) with icons for Home, Buy, Sell, Chat, Profile. For desktop, use a left sidebar or a top nav that becomes sticky.
components_instructions.Bento_Grid_Home: Create a CSS Grid (md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4) with gap-6. Mix large hero spans (col-span-2 row-span-2) for featured deals, and smaller squares for categories.
components_instructions.Product_Card: Rounded corners (rounded-2xl), image on top (aspect-square object-cover), condition badge floating on image. Below: Title, Price, AI Fair Price indicator (Teal), and Seller Rating.
components_instructions.AI_Valuation_Page: Use a dark, tech-focused layout. Add animated charts (recharts) showing price trends. Include a 'Demand Meter' progress bar. Animate the device scanning process using Framer Motion (a sweeping translucent line).
components_instructions.Chat_UI: Split-pane layout on desktop (list on left, active chat on right). Mobile uses list view leading to full-screen chat. Include quick-reply chips and an 'Make Offer' action button at the top.
components_instructions.Sell_Flow: Multi-step form using ShadCN components. Step 1: Device type. Step 2: Upload images. Step 3: Condition details. Step 4: AI Valuation Result screen with pricing recommendations before final publish.
components_instructions.Trust_Badges: Use Lucide icons (ShieldCheck, BadgeCheck) with Teal color to denote verified sellers, inspected items, and secure escrow.
components_instructions.Testing: All interactive elements (buttons, links, inputs) MUST have a data-testid attribute formatted in kebab-case.
